## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Validation

- Commands/tests run:
- Key outputs/results:

## Change Control Checklist

- [ ] Change type(s) identified (web/api/pipeline/cron/workflow/migration/docs)
- [ ] Relevant invariants reviewed (auth headers, health endpoints, secret exposure)
- [ ] Required build/type checks passed for touched surfaces
- [ ] `verify-ops-docs` workflow check is passing
- [ ] If `infrastructure/vm-cron/crontab` changed, ops docs were updated (`docs/OPERATING_MODEL.md` or `docs/CHANGE_CONTROL.md`)
- [ ] Rollback plan is stated
- [ ] Post-deploy verification plan is stated
